message:
Commit latest changes from concurrent agent development

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "beads_rust"
-version = "0.1.26"
+version = "0.1.27"
 edition = "2024"
 rust-version = "1.88"
 description = "Agent-first issue tracker (SQLite + JSONL)"

@@ -219,7 +219,7 @@ fn execute_upgrade(args: &UpgradeArgs, current_version: &str, ctx: &OutputContex
             BeadsError::Other(anyhow::anyhow!(
                 "{msg}

\
                  This binary was built without archive support for the required format (e.g., .tar.gz).
\
-                 This is a known issue in some versions (e.g., 0.1.21 - 0.1.26) where the 'archive-tar' feature was not correctly linked.

\
+                 This is a known issue in some older versions (e.g., 0.1.21 - 0.1.26). Version 0.1.27 and later include the correct 'archive-tar' linkage.

\
                  Please upgrade manually by running:

  \
                  curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_rust/main/install.sh | bash

\
                  Or by downloading the release from:
  \
